title: Dyelation
description: Adds Dye Depot compatibility with several mods!
body:
Adds [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) compat with multiple other mods

**You shouldn't need to have all of these mods installed for this to work, only Dye Depot** <small>(and [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config))</small> **is necessary!**

Mods where this mod adds full new blocks/items/etc
<small>(i.e. they require this as a dedicated compat mod)</small>:
- [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
  - I know [Patch Up](https://modrinth.com/mod/patch-up) already adds compat for this, so this mod won't add its new blocks if Patch Up is also present. <small>(This was done because I initially made this for a private modpack, and Another Furniture was the only Patch Up mod in it)</small>
- [Bundle Backport-ish](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-backportish)
- [Desire](https://modrinth.com/mod/desiremod)
- [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated/)
- [Hexical](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexical)
- [Items Displayed](https://modrinth.com/mod/items-displayed/)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- [Verdant](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod/)

Mods that have the items already but without resources or data
<small>(i.e. this could be done with a resource/data pack instead)</small>:
- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn)
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments/)
- [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
  - NOTE: this mod ONLY fixes the block behaviour of sharestones, NOT their models/textures. Please also use the [Waystones x Dye Depot resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waystones-dye-depot) for that.

Also adds an optional resource pack that, like Dye Depot, renames Light Blue to Sky and Light Gray to Ash (but for modded items)
